notes: Executed through the Coolify production PostgreSQL resource terminal using the existing isolated restore-proof contract.
No password, token, connection string, API key, user record, bot record, order payload, position payload, or log payload is included in this artifact.
The drill created a compressed dump in /tmp, restored it into an isolated postgres_restore_check_* database, validated aggregate table counts, dropped the restore database, and removed the dump.
A post-run verification query confirmed zero postgres_restore_check_% databases and zero /tmp/postgres_backup_*.dump files remained.
